name: memory-arbor-codex
description: Memory Arbor downgraded Codex integration using shared skills and MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Prompt-only memory continuity with shared Memory Arbor tools
interface.longDescription: Use Memory Arbor memory tools and skills from Codex. This downgraded integration cannot rewrite or delete host conversation context; use a new session to continue from the shared memory store.
defaultPrompt: Load relevant Memory Arbor context for this repository.
Continue from the shared Memory Arbor store.
